subject: TestBookmarksRepository — complete stub bluff
real_counterpart: BookmarksRepositoryImpl (lava.data.impl.repository, Room BookmarkDao with @PrimaryKey on category id; newTopics encoded as JSONArray)
stub_status: Every method body is TODO('Not yet implemented') except clear() which is a no-op. clear() is the only method MenuViewModelTest could currently exercise, and no MenuViewModelTest test invokes MenuAction.ClearBookmarks — so the stub is latent (constructed-but-never-called).
test: TestBookmarksRepositoryStubBluffTest (INVERTED: 3 tests pass *because* the fake throws NotImplementedError on getAllBookmarks, isBookmark, and observeBookmarks)
decision: Option A — document the stub status as a known bluff in the exemption ledger and defer full behavioral-equivalence implementation to the first SP-3a feature that actually consumes BookmarksRepository (anticipated Phase 4 tracker_settings UI or later).
menu_viewmodel_test_finding: feature/menu/src/test/kotlin/lava/menu/MenuViewModelTest.kt:115-118 constructs ClearBookmarksUseCase(bookmarksRepository = TestBookmarksRepository(), ...) but no @Test method invokes MenuAction.ClearBookmarks — confirmed by grep of the file. The stub is wired but never called; MenuViewModelTest passes today only because the bookmark code path is dormant.
mutation: Replaced TestBookmarksRepository.isBookmark() body from `TODO("Not yet implemented")` to `return false`
observed: java.lang.AssertionError: expected kotlin.NotImplementedError to be thrown, but nothing was thrown — at TestBookmarksRepositoryStubBluffTest.kt:65 (isBookmark_throws_NotImplementedError_proving_fake_is_a_stub_bluff). Test report XML: core/testing/build/test-results/testDebugUnitTest/TEST-lava.testing.repository.TestBookmarksRepositoryStubBluffTest.xml. The other two tests (getAllBookmarks_..., observeBookmarks_...) remained green during the mutation, confirming the failure was scoped exactly to the mutated method.
post_revert_run: BUILD SUCCESSFUL — all 3 inverted tests pass against the restored stub.
